task_description: Implement Phase 2 (User Experience) and Phase 3 (Admin Experience) improvements from the Gap Closure Plan. Phase 2 adds upload progress tracking, OCR status visibility, recently viewed documents, saved filters, document lifecycle indicators, drag-and-drop upload, and keyboard navigation. Phase 3 adds system health summary, OCR queue depth, storage usage, worker status, and failed job retry controls.

verification.summary: Build succeeds (7.35s), typecheck passes (0 errors), all 5 tests pass. Docker build skipped due to INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network. No new tests were required as this feature is UI-only with existing smoke tests covering the module graph.
